response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced full-stack engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang skills, but does not match this role's core requirements. His C++ experience is limited and dated (a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments and a thesis project), far short of the required 5–10 years of recent hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain expertise beyond a short fintech engagement at RIDE Capital that used a JavaScript stack. While his systems-level DLang low-latency work shows adjacent aptitude, the gap on the mandatory skills is too large for this consulting engagement.
strengths: Extensive overall engineering experience across web, backend, and low-latency systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (DLang, async I/O) shows performance-oriented skills adjacent to C++
Strong testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and low-latency systems background
